ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "plate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plate used in the experiment */,
  "well" TEXT /* Well in the plate where the experiment was conducted */,
  "field" INTEGER /* Field in the well where the experiment was conducted */,
  "n_0" INTEGER /* Initial number of cells */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Type of treatment (e.g., Untreated, Treated) */,
  "drugs" TEXT /* Drugs used in the treatment */,
  "drug1" TEXT /* First drug used in the treatment */,
  "drug1_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the first drug */,
  "drug2" TEXT /* Second drug used in the treatment */,
  "drug2_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the second drug */,
  "start_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the experiment started */,
  "end_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the experiment ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., in progress, completed, paused) */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_drug2 FOREIGN KEY ("drug2") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_treatment FOREIGN KEY ("treatment") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_drug1 FOREIGN KEY ("drug1") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_plate_id FOREIGN KEY ("plate_id") REFERENCES plates ("plate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_points" (
  "time_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time point */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "elapsed_minutes" INTEGER /* Elapsed time in minutes */,
  "hours" REAL /* Elapsed time in hours */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the time point */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the time point (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_points_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "time_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time point */,
  "n" INTEGER /* Number of cells at the time point */,
  "nuclei_cc_mean_intensity" REAL /* Mean intensity of cell nuclei */,
  "cyto_cc_mean_intensity" REAL /* Mean intensity of cell cytoplasm */,
  "cell_cc_mean_intensity_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of mean intensity of cell cytoplasm to cell nuclei */,
  "cell_cc_max_intensity_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of maximum intensity of cell cytoplasm to cell nuclei */,
  "cell_cc_min_intensity_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of minimum intensity of cell cytoplasm to cell nuclei */,
  "cell_nr_count_nuclei" REAL /* Count of cell nuclei */,
  "cell_nr_proportion_multinucleated_cells" REAL /* Proportion of multinucleated cells */,
  "g1_proportion" REAL /* Proportion of cells in the G1 phase */,
  "cell_count_norm_t0" REAL /* Normalized cell count at time 0 */,
  "cell_morphology_data" TEXT /* Additional morphological data */,
  "cell_function_data" TEXT /* Additional functional data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the measurement (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cell_measurements_time_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_point_id") REFERENCES time_points ("time_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plates" (
  "plate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plate */,
  "plate_name" TEXT /* Name of the plate */,
  "plate_type" TEXT /* Type of the plate (e.g., 96-well, 384-well) */,
  "plate_description" TEXT /* Description of the plate */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the plate (e.g., in use, archived) */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who owns the plate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wells" (
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well */,
  "plate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plate */,
  "well_name" TEXT /* Name of the well (e.g., A1, B2) */,
  "well_description" TEXT /* Description of the well */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the well (e.g., in use, empty) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("well_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_plate_id FOREIGN KEY ("plate_id") REFERENCES plates ("plate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field (e.g., 1, 2) */,
  "field_description" TEXT /* Description of the field */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the field (e.g., in use, empty) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fields_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "treatment_description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  "start_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the treatment started */,
  "end_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the treatment ended */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Detailed description of the treatment protocol */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drugs" (
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug */,
  "drug_name" TEXT /* Name of the drug */,
  "drug_description" TEXT /* Description of the drug */,
  "concentration_units" TEXT /* Units for drug concentration (e.g., μM, mM) */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the drug */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the drug */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the image belongs to */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., PNG, JPEG) */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the image in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
